title: Milium capillare

The classification of Milium capillare is further broken down into the kingdom Plantae, the division Magnoliophyta, the class Liliopsida, and the order Poales. intro: Milium capillare, commonly known as milium or milium grain, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Poaceae.
